name: Energy Fuels Inc.
description: Energy Fuels Inc. is America's largest uranium producer, operating the White Mesa Mill in Utah—the only fully licensed conventional uranium mill in the United States—along with producing mines including the Pinyon Plain Mine in Arizona and the La Sal Complex in Utah. The company is also expanding into rare earth element production and medical isotope recovery at its White Mesa facility, positioning itself as a critical minerals producer for the U.S. market.
